title: Cashiers
description: Receive and disburse money in establishments other than financial institutions. May use electronic scanners, cash registers, or related equipment. May process credit or debit card transactions and validate checks.

tasks.text: Receive payment by cash, check, credit cards, vouchers, or automatic debits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Greet customers entering establishments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Issue receipts, refunds, credits, or change due to customers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Assist customers by providing information and resolving their complaints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor checkout stations to ensure they have adequate cash available and are staffed appropriately.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Establish or identify prices of goods, services, or admission, and tabulate bills, using calculators, cash registers, or optical price scanners.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer incoming phone calls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer customers' questions, and provide information on procedures or policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Request information or assistance, using paging systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Help customers find the location of products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Process merchandise returns and exchanges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain clean and orderly checkout areas, and complete other general cleaning duties, such as mopping floors and emptying trash cans.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Calculate total payments received during a time period, and reconcile this with total sales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Count money in cash drawers at the beginning of shifts to ensure that amounts are correct and that there is adequate change.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Issue trading stamps, and redeem food stamps and coupons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Post charges against guests' or patients' accounts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute and record totals of transactions.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Weigh items sold by weight to determine prices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sort, count, and wrap currency and coins.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep periodic balance sheets of amounts and numbers of transactions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile and maintain non-monetary reports and records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Supervise others and provide on-the-job training.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist with duties in other areas of the store, such as monitoring fitting rooms or bagging and carrying out customers' items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Sell tickets and other items to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stock shelves, sort and reshelve returned items, and mark prices on items and shelves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bag, box, wrap, or gift-wrap merchandise, and prepare packages for shipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cash checks for customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Offer customers carry-out service at the completion of transactions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
